title: Contact-Rich Manipulation
description: Annotate robotic manipulation videos that involve sustained contact — wiping, pushing, scooping, inserting. These tasks are harder for vision-only models because success depends on force and compliance, not just position. Contributors label contact phases, tool-surface interactions, and task completion criteria.

tasks.title: Record contact-rich task
tasks.description: Record a manipulation task involving sustained surface contact: wiping a table, scooping into a container, inserting a plug, pushing an object along a surface.

tasks.title: Contact phase annotation
tasks.description: Segment into free-space/approach/contact/sustained-contact/release phases. Label tool and surface types. Describe the force intent (push, slide, press, scoop).

tasks.title: Peer review
tasks.description: Another qualified contributor reviews phase boundaries and force-intent labels. Disputes resolved by quorum.
